prompts.title: 电商主图 - 月光动漫巧克力盒
prompts.prompt: Create a premium luxury patisserie product photograph of a limited-edition chocolate box inspired by an original anime-style girl character named {argument name="character name" default="Nozomu"}. The box is open on an elegant dark satin tabletop with crystal glassware, soft flowers, scattered sparkles, and a pale satin ribbon, photographed like a real high-end department-store confectionery gift set. The inside lid features a large illustrated package design: a dreamy moonlit night sky with teal-to-navy gradient, crescent moon, hanging gold stars, city skyline silhouettes, ornate gold corner filigree, pale pink and blue flowers, and an anime girl with long dark bluish-black hair with pink highlights, floral hair accessories, and an off-shoulder white ruffled dress; leave the face unobstructed in the generated image unless a privacy-safe blank face placeholder is desired. Add elegant gold Japanese-style branding text on the lid: {argument name="main name text" default="のぞむ"}, small romanized text {argument name="romanized name text" default="NOZOMU"}, script subtitle {argument name="collection title" default="Moonlit Dream"}, and small uppercase text "CHOCOLATE COLLECTION". In the lower tray, show exactly 10 luxury chocolates in a 2-by-5 grid with gold dividers and black paper cups: 1 glossy sky-blue dome with gold leaf, 2 cream rose-shaped chocolate, 3 faceted pale blue crystal chocolate, 4 dark round chocolate with gold crescent moon and starry night surface, 5 white daisy flower chocolate with gold center, 6 pale blue-white speckled dome, 7 pink flower chocolate with gold center, 8 glossy purple-blue heart chocolate with tiny star speckles, 9 faceted pale blush crystal chocolate with gold flecks, and 10 sky-blue marbled dome with gold constellation lines. Include a matching small display card in front of the box with the same branding text and moon motif. Use soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections, delicate gold foil details, pastel celestial palette, ultra-detailed premium packaging, and a romantic fantasy luxury chocolate aesthetic. Avoid extra chocolates, avoid modern logos, avoid cluttered typography, and keep the box and all 10 chocolates sharply visible.

prompts.prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style illustration in a wide 16:9 frame. In the left foreground, show {argument name="character name" default="a glamorous academy girl"} leaning in the shade of a grand stone arcade, seen from a slightly low, diagonal camera angle. She has long messy {argument name="hair color" default="blonde hair with a vivid pink front streak"}, tan skin, golden-brown eyes, glossy lips, and a confident teasing smile while holding a pale blue popsicle to her mouth. Her hair is windblown and highly detailed with loose curls, decorated with pearl-like beads, small flowers, and metallic hair ornaments. She wears an ornate fantasy school uniform: an oversized dusty pink cardigan with gold buttons, star pins, and a dark crest patch, a white open-collar blouse, a dark purple ribbon tie with gold compass-like motifs, a navy high-waisted skirt or corset waist with gold buttons and a small chain, plus delicate jewelry including hoop earrings, layered necklaces, rings, bracelets, and a black choker. The setting is an elegant fantasy academy courtyard with tall cathedral-like gothic buildings, spires, stone columns, arched walkways, and blue hanging banners decorated with gold compass emblems; include exactly 2 prominent hanging banners on the building side. In the right background, include small distant students walking through the sunlit courtyard, reduced to simple silhouettes and uniform shapes. Lighting should contrast deep cool shadow on the girl and arcade with bright midday sunlight in the courtyard, a saturated blue sky, scattered white clouds, and strong perspective lines leading toward the castle-like academy. Use a polished Japanese anime key visual style with reduced but precise linework, rich painterly background detail, dramatic composition, warm highlights, cool shadows, subtle lens-like cinematic depth, no text, no watermark.

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 手绘线性素描艺术
prompts.prompt: Generate a paper-based line drawing visual work based on a specific theme. The image is first established by extremely fine, slightly shaky hand-drawn lines to build space, subject outline, structural transitions, paths, and scale relationships. Then, a few high-purity color surfaces are introduced only to the most critical recognition planes, connection nodes, emotional pauses, and centers of gravity; color is not a full fill but acts as precise annotations to edit attention. The overall visual area is dominated by warm off-white paper and black fine lines. Paper texture, tiny spots, and a slight scan feel should be clearly present. Ample white space is reserved above or around to make the subject appear as if observed in a page of a travel manuscript. Visual weight is concentrated in the middle or lower-middle part, maintaining breathable distance around the subject. The composition consists of a clear anchor, a low-density environment layer, and a few colored nodes. The core object maintains recognizable structural lines, outlines, local hatching, and compressed details. Details gather along edges, openings, corners, and movement paths. Volume and shadows are achieved through fine hatching and varying line density. Background appears as a low-density line-art memory layer. Added tiny figures or symbols serve as scale 'noise' to give a sense of life and usage. If text is needed, use narrow, restrained annotation-style fonts. The final surface shows the finish of pen line drawing, colored pencil, or light ink overlay, with quiet, open, manual textures and slight perspective errors. Theme: {argument name="subject" default="Close-up of the Great Hall of the People"} Aspect Ratio: {argument name="ratio" default="1:2"} Usage: {argument name="usage" default="Mobile wallpaper"}
tags: 个人资料 / 头像 - 手绘线性素描艺术

prompts.title: 信息图/教育视觉 - 双面板雪屋模型对比
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical side-by-side model comparison poster showing the same snowy modern mountain cabin scene rendered in two stacked panels, with bold labels identifying each model.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 image, approximately 768×1024 px. Split the canvas horizontally into exactly 2 equal photographic panels with no thick border between them.

Layout:
- Panel 1, top half: snowy alpine landscape with a modern dark wooden A-frame cabin on a hill, evergreen trees, pastel winter sky, and one small hiker walking toward the cabin along a trail of footprints. Add a large label in the upper-left reading {argument name="top label" default="Banana pro"}.
- Panel 2, bottom half: a very similar snowy alpine cabin scene from a slightly lower and closer perspective, with warmer sunset colors, denser foreground trees, one small hiker on a snowy path, and a large label in the upper-left reading {argument name="bottom label" default="GPT image 2"}.

Counted visible elements:
- Exactly 2 stacked comparison panels.
- Exactly 2 large text labels: “Banana pro” on the top panel and “GPT image 2” on the bottom panel.
- Exactly 2 modern cabins, one per panel.
- Exactly 2 human figures, one per panel, both small and walking away from the viewer.
- Each panel should include many snow-covered evergreen trees, but keep the composition focused on the cabin and path.

Scene details: Both panels depict a winter evening in a snowy conifer forest. The cabin is contemporary, tall, angular, and steep-roofed, with dark vertical wood siding, warm glowing rectangular windows, a concrete or stone lower level, and a roof with dark solar-panel-like sections or skylights. The snow should show soft wind-shaped drifts and a clear trail of footprints leading from the foreground toward the hiker and cabin. The sky should be soft lavender, pink, and pale blue, suggesting dusk.

Typography: Use a large decorative blocky condensed serif or western-style display font, white fill with dark outline and subtle internal striping. Place the text flush near the top-left of each panel, large enough to dominate the corner without covering the cabin.

Visual style: Photorealistic architectural visualization, crisp winter detail, high dynamic range, warm window light contrasting with cold snow, cinematic dusk lighting. The top panel should feel slightly cleaner and more minimal with a pale lavender sky; the bottom panel should feel more dramatic and polished with stronger pink sunset clouds and richer contrast.

Constraints: Do not add logos, watermarks, extra captions, UI frames, or additional people. Keep the two-panel comparison structure obvious and preserve the exact label wording unless customized.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 双面板雪屋模型对比
